tracks.meaning: An authoritative order or instruction given to a person or group to perform a specific action
A directive or instruction given to a computer program or system to execute a specific operation or function
Authority or control over a person, organization, or situation
The act of leading, controlling, or directing a person, group, or activity
A spoken or written instruction or order requiring compliance
The authority or ability to perform on stage or to direct performers in a theatrical setting
A legal order or directive issued by a court or official authority
Mastery, dominance, or control over a situation or person
A separate section or subdivision within a larger structure or organization
